---
title: "Ben Sylvester's Word"
sort_title: "Ben Sylvester's Word"
year: 1856
slug: "Ben Sylvester's Word"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---


*1856*



### **Online text of*****Ben Sylvester's Word***

[Click here to reach the latest version of*Ben Sylvester's Wordfrom Google Books*](http://books.google.co.uk/books?id=FkcuAAAAYAAJ&printsec=frontcover&dq=Ben%2BSylvester%27s%2BWord&source=bl&ots=CnZq0L7sT0&sig=FjIKPib5KQjSvcQ3E4a2soAKLwY&hl=en&ei=bwdZS9nAGo380wS6mZiICg&sa=X&oi=book_result&ct=result&resnum=1&ved=0CAcQ6AEwAA#v=onepage&q=&f=false)  
(opens in new tab or new window)
